task_completion.description: Verify the organization 'NovaTech Solutions' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CRM screen showing 'NovaTech Solutions' in the Organizations/Accounts list, or a details view of the newly created organization.

task_completion.description: Verify the document title is set to 'NovaTech Solutions - Signed NDA'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document creation form or document details page shows 'NovaTech Solutions - Signed NDA' entered in the Title field.
The file upload field, attachment section, or file picker dialog shows 'Standard_NDA.pdf' selected for upload.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is placed in the 'Default' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder dropdown or folder assignment field shows 'Default' selected on the document form or details page.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is linked to the 'NovaTech Solutions' organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Related To', 'Organization', or 'Linked To' field in the document form or details page explicitly shows 'NovaTech Solutions'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the CRM rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (e.g., Firefox/Chromium) open to the CRM interface, with no terminal windows executing curl or API commands to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely selected the file from the local file system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should ideally show the OS file picker dialog navigating to /home/ga/Documents/ and selecting Standard_NDA.pdf, or the browser's native file upload indicator showing the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element/DevTools) should be visible in the screenshots modifying the DOM to fake the organization name or document details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected target organization name is exactly 'NovaTech Solutions'. The document title must be exactly 'NovaTech Solutions - Signed NDA'. The uploaded file must be 'Standard_NDA.pdf' originating from the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.
